description: Loket.nl is a Dutch payroll and HR platform. Its developer portal describes APIs for integrating external applications with Loket payroll, employment, and related operational data.
summary: Loket.nl exposes a partner-only OAuth2-protected REST API on `/v2` plus documented microservice REST APIs including Absence and AccessAndIdentity; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in the developer docs reviewed.
